lingala.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Nasosoli — limbola na maloba na ngai
lingala.start_your_microphone_and_try_it_when_: Pelisa mikrofone na yo mpe meka yango! Soki osilisi, finá "Kosilisa."
lingala.mark_warm_up_as_complete: Tia elembo na kobɔndisa lokola esili
lingala.reset_all_session_data: Zongisa ba data nyonso ya session
lingala.the_melody_of_your_speech_rising_pitch: Loyembo ya maloba na yo. Bosanda ya mongongo emati = mituna, ekiti = maloba, bokeseni = kotia makasi.
lingala.pitch_zone_legend: Ndimbola ya bisika ya bosanda ya mongongo
lingala.how_fast_you_are_speaking_in_words_per: Ndenge olobaka mbangu, na maloba na miniti.
lingala.your_speaking_volume_and_steadiness_ov: Makasi ya mongongo na yo ya koloba mpe bopikami na yango na ntango.
lingala.good_speakers_use_pauses_aim_for_20_30: Balobi malamu basalelaka kopema! Luká 20-30% ya kopema na maloba na yo.
lingala.analyzes_pause_patterns_syllable_rate_: Etalaka ba modèle ya kopema, bopikami ya mbangu ya ba silabe, mpe bopikami ya makasi ya mongongo mpo na kosala score ya bopɛtɔ. Kanga ata segɔnde 10 ya maloba, na sima finá "Talá bopɛtɔ."
lingala.analyze_fluency_from_current_recording: Talá bopɛtɔ na ba data ya kokanga ya sikoyo
lingala.formant_vowel_space_lab: Laboratware ya esika ya vowelle na formant
lingala.visualizes_your_vowel_sounds_on_an_ipa: Emonisaka mangungu ya ba vowelle na yo na kaɛ ya ba vowelle ya IPA na kosalela botali ya formant (F1/F2). Loba vowelle mpe talá ntɔnga oyo ezali kotambola mpo na komonisa esika vowelle na yo ekweaka. Mode ya nzela emonisaka mbongwana ya diphtongue!
lingala.green_circles_target_vowel_positions_o: Bazsingá ya mai ya pɔndu = bisika ya vowelle ya mokano. Ntɔnga ya orange = vowelle na yo ya sikoyo. Nzela ya violette = mbongwana ya vowelle ya sika.
lingala.recordings_are_automatically_saved_whe: Ba kokanga ebombamaka na yango moko soki otɛlɛmisi mikrofone. Zongisa yango na annotation ya loyembo esangisami. Ba kokanga 3 ya nsuka ebombamaka.
lingala.no_recordings_yet_start_and_stop_the_m: Naino kokanga te. Pelisa mpe tɛlɛmisa mikrofone mpo na kobomba kokanga.
lingala.select_first_recording_to_compare: Poná kokanga ya liboso mpo na kokokanisa
lingala.select_second_recording_to_compare: Poná kokanga ya mibale mpo na kokokanisa
lingala.choose_an_exercise_type_the_tool_will_: Poná lolenge ya exercice. Esaleli ekopesa yo bafraze mpo na komeka na retour ya loyembo na ntango ya solo.
lingala.back_to_exercise_type_selection: Zonga na boponi ya lolenge ya exercice
lingala.generate_new_ai_exercises: Sala ba exercice ya sika ya AI
lingala.say_this_phrase_with_the_emotion_below: Loba fraze oyo na mayoki oyo ezali na nse. Talá ndenge bosanda ya mongongo na yo mpe makasi ya mongongo ebongwanaka!
lingala.say_the_phrase_with_this_feeling_notic: Loba fraze na mayoki OYO. Talá makambo oyo ezali kokomela bosanda ya mongongo na yo!
lingala.say_the_same_words_as_a_statement_pitc: Loba maloba wana ndenge moko lokola liloba (bosanda ya mongongo ekiti na nsuka) mpe lokola motuna (bosanda ya mongongo emati). Talá bokeseni na graphique ya bosanda ya mongongo!
lingala.the_same_sentence_means_different_thin: Fraze moko elimboli makambo ekeseni na kotalela liloba nini otie makasi. Poná liloba na nse, na sima loba fraze na kotia liloba wana makasi.
lingala.read_the_passage_below_at_the_target_s: Tanga eteni ya nse na mbangu ya mokano. Emeki-mbangu ekomonisa yo ndenge ozali kokende mbangu!
lingala.keep_going_hold_your_volume_steady: Kobá! Batela makasi ya mongongo na yo pikapika.
lingala.back_to_exercise_type_selection_2: Zonga na boponi ya lolenge ya exercice
lingala.target_pitch_pattern_green_zone_target: Modèle ya bosanda ya mongongo ya mokano (esika ya mai ya pɔndu = mokano, orange = bosanda ya mongongo na yo):
lingala.start_practicing_this_intonation_patte: Banda komeka modèle ya loyembo oyo
lingala.say_the_phrase_now_try_to_match_the_gr: Loba fraze sikoyo! Meka kokokanisa na esika ya mai ya pɔndu ya mokano.
lingala.stop_and_score_my_attempt: Tɛlɛmisa mpe pesá score na komeka na ngai
lingala.score_my_attempt: ✓ Pesá score na komeka na ngai
lingala.slps_use_specific_prosody_patterns_as_: Baganga ya maloba basalelaka ba modèle ya loyembo ya sikisiki lokola mikano ya clinique. Poná modèle mpo na komona molɔngɔ ya bosanda ya mongongo ya mokano mpe komeka kokokanisa yango.
lingala.pitch_contour_graph: Graphique ya molɔngɔ ya bosanda ya mongongo
lingala.multilingual_pronunciation_lab: Laboratware ya kobimisa maloba ya minɔkɔ mingi
lingala.practice_pronunciation_in_any_language: Meka kobimisa maloba na monɔkɔ nyonso! AI ekosala modèle ya fraze, na sima yo omekaka kokokanisa loyembo na yango.
lingala.hear_the_ai_model_speak_this_phrase: Yoka modèle ya AI koloba fraze oyo
lingala.your_turn_to_speak_the_phrase: Ngala na yo ya koloba fraze
lingala.your_turn_speak_the_phrase_and_try_to_: Ngala na yo! Loba fraze mpe meka kokokanisa modèle ya bosanda ya mongongo.
lingala.dashed_line_model_solid_line_your_spee: Molɔngɔ ya bakato = modèle, molɔngɔ ya kokoka = maloba na yo. Meka kosala ete ekokana!
lingala.prosody_comparison_graph_showing_model: Graphique ya bokokanisi ya loyembo emonisaka courbe ya modèle mpe courbe ya maloba na yo na likolo ya moko na mosusu
lingala.summary_of_your_practice_session_share: Bokuse ya session na yo ya komeka. Kabolá yango na monganga na yo ya maloba!
lingala.generate_a_text_summary_of_this_sessio: Sala bokuse ya makomi ya session oyo oyo okoki kokabola na monganga na yo ya maloba.
lingala.generate_session_report_for_sharing: Sala lapolo ya session mpo na kokabola
lingala.clear_all_session_data_and_start_fresh: Longola ba data nyonso ya session mpe banda sika
lingala.clear_all_session_data: Longola ba data nyonso ya session
lingala.oratory_and_prosody_communication_lab: Laboratware ya bosolongano ya lisukulu mpe loyembo
lingala.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Zonga na liste ya bisaleli ya STEM Lab
lingala.speech_prosody_visualization_for_slp_r: Bomonisi ya loyembo ya maloba mpo na komeka oyo monganga ya maloba apesaki toli
lingala.live_visualizer_record_read_your_deliv: Emonisi ya mbala moko — kanga mpe tanga bopesi na yo
lingala.real_time_pitch_trace_volume_meter_fil: Elandeli ya bosanda ya mongongo ya ntango ya solo + emeki ya makasi ya mongongo + motángi ya maloba ya kotondisa. Balobi bakolela babongolaka bosanda ya mongongo ~30% na fraze; bopesi ya sɛbɛ ebungisaka bokebi ya moyoki na kati ya ~segɔnde 20.
lingala.pacing_target_150_wpm_pauses_between_i: Mokano ya mbangu ~maloba 150/miniti. Kopema kati ya makanisi (segɔnde 1-2) ezali na kilo lokola maloba. Tanga liboso makomi na yo na mongongo makasi; ba fraze ya mabe emimonisaka mbala moko.
lingala.multilingual_same_speech_multiple_lang: Minɔkɔ mingi — lisukulu moko, minɔkɔ mingi
lingala.speech_rate_varies_dramatically_by_lan: Mbangu ya maloba ekeseni mingi na kotalela monɔkɔ: Espagnol + Japonais ~ba silabe 7/segɔnde; Anglais ~6; Mandarin ~5. Mbangu ya sango ezali pene pikapika — minɔkɔ ya kotonda elobaka malɛmbɛ.
lingala.report_your_delivery_analytics: Lapolo — botali ya bopesi na yo
lingala.pace_pitch_range_filler_word_density_p: Mbangu, etando ya bosanda ya mongongo, boike ya maloba ya kotondisa, ntango ya kopema — moko na moko epesamaka score na kotalela mikano oyo boluki esimbaka. Finá etando nyonso mpo na komona citation + toli ya coaching.
lingala.prosody_discover_how_delivery_shapes_m: Loyembo — luká ndenge bopesi esalaka ndimbola
lingala.adjust_pitch_offset_pace_and_volume_ga: Bongola bopusi ya bosanda ya mongongo, mbangu, mpe kobakisa makasi ya mongongo, na sima komá makambo oyo omoni. Score te, komonisa te — sala mokano na yo moko mpo na ntina nini masukulu mingi ya TED ezali pene na maloba 150/miniti.
lingala.suited_to_emphasis_reflection_gravitas: Ebongi mpo na kotia makasi, komanyola, kilo.
lingala.default_for_most_speaking_natural_rhyt: Ya kozanga boponi mpo na koloba mingi. Rité ya bomoto.
lingala.adjust_pitch_offset_pacing_volume_disc: Bongola bopusi ya bosanda ya mongongo, mbangu, makasi ya mongongo. Bokaboli ya kokabwana ya tempo 4. Score te, komonisa te.
lingala.hypothesis_how_does_pace_affect_audien: Mokano: Ndenge nini mbangu ezali kosala bososoli ya bayoki?
lingala.most_ted_talks_are_150_wpm_investigate: Masukulu mingi ya TED ezali ~maloba 150/miniti. Luká ntina.
lingala.when_does_pitch_variation_help_vs_dist: Ntango nini bokeseni ya bosanda ya mongongo esalisaka na ntango nini ebebisaka bokebi?
lingala.explain_how_prosody_shapes_oratory_imp: Limbola ndenge loyembo esalaka bopusi ya lisukulu.
lingala.design_note_discrete_4_tempo_marker_no: Note ya conception: elembo ya kokabwana ya tempo 4; score ya bopesi te; komonisa te — na nko.
lingala.this_tool_is_designed_as_a_tier_1_clas: Esaleli oyo esalemi lokola cotisation ya kelasi ya Niveau 1. Mpo na thérapie ya maloba ya moto na moto, svp tuná monganga ya maloba oyo azali na diplome.
lingala.visualizations_use_web_audio_api_pitch: Bomonisi esalelaka bomoni ya bosanda ya mongongo ya Web Audio API (bokutani-nzoto) mpe botali ya bonene. Botali nyonso esalemaka na esika na kati ya navigateur — mongongo moko te ekangamaka to etindamaka.
